selections.name: Royal Princess
selections.reason: Scott Singleton trained, Mikayla Weir riding. Drawn barrier 1 which is perfect on this tight track. Solid form at Scone and Hawkesbury.

selections.name: Lady Lilibet
selections.reason: Kody Nestor trained and ridden. Coming off a last-start maiden win at Dubbo.

selections.name: Purple Prince
selections.reason: Consistent performer, placed last start at Taree.

selections.name: Heapy's Legacy
selections.reason: Scott Singleton trained, has some decent runs at Scone.

danger_horse.name: Lady Lilibet
danger_horse.reason: Consistent type who is a major threat off her last-start win.

selections.name: Ordinary Angel
selections.reason: Aaron Bullock riding, Todd Howlett trained. Three consecutive 2nd place finishes, including one at Gunnedah. Drawn well in barrier 3.

selections.name: Magic Merlin
selections.reason: Mikayla Weir riding, Brett Cavanough trained. Excellent 2nd first-up at Muswellbrook. Drawn barrier 2.

selections.name: Redaluca Girl
selections.reason: Consistent placegetter, Jake Pracey-Holmes riding.

selections.name: Share Our Secret
selections.reason: Decent 4th last start at Muswellbrook.

danger_horse.name: Magic Merlin
danger_horse.reason: Strong first-up performance and represents a major threat.

selections.name: Zubba Storm
selections.reason: Aaron Bullock riding, Mack Griffith trained. Dominant maiden winner at Dubbo last start.

selections.name: Go Russian
selections.reason: Izzy Neale riding, Rodney Ollerton trained. Drawn barrier 2, has good speed and strong provincial form.

selections.name: Our Emily
selections.reason: Jordie Thompson riding, John Bannister trained. Track specialist, won here previously.

selections.name: Snatchreilly
selections.reason: Jasmine Urquhart-Warren riding, David Hatch trained. Placed at Tamworth two starts back.

danger_horse.name: Go Russian
danger_horse.reason: Drawn perfectly inside and possesses excellent early speed.

selections.name: Bellerata
selections.reason: Gabrielle Johnston riding, Wayne Wilkes trained. Consistent maiden form with multiple placings.

selections.name: Russian Words
selections.reason: Izzy Neale riding, Rodney Ollerton trained. Decent runs at Newcastle and Quirindi.

selections.name: Life Is A Shiraz
selections.reason: Clayton Gallagher riding, Brett Robb trained. Showing promise.

selections.name: Dream A Little
selections.reason: Donovan Dillon riding, Jay Hopkins trained. Placed last start at Scone.

danger_horse.name: Russian Words
danger_horse.reason: Strong provincial formlines make her a major danger.

selections.name: Nielsen Park
selections.reason: Aaron Bullock riding, Mack Griffith trained. Excellent 2nd first-up at Muswellbrook. Drawn barrier 3.

selections.name: Side Quest
selections.reason: Juliet Partridge riding, Holly Williams trained. Very consistent with a 2nd and a 4th at Tamworth.

selections.name: Cassie's Angel
selections.reason: Nick Palmer riding, Jay Hopkins trained. Strong 2nd at Scone last start.

selections.name: Looking The Part
selections.reason: Izzy Neale riding, Cassandra Stummer trained. Resuming, has shown ability.

danger_horse.name: Side Quest
danger_horse.reason: Highly consistent and represents a major threat.

selections.name: Valedor
selections.reason: Aaron Bullock riding, Paul Messara trained. Impressive debut winner at Muswellbrook. Drawn barrier 1.

selections.name: Krystina Kerima
selections.reason: Angel Brennan riding, Les Roberts trained. Last start winner at Muswellbrook, consistent form.

selections.name: Vendor
selections.reason: Clayton Gallagher riding, Mack Griffith trained. Decent 3rd last start at Warren.

selections.name: Proclivity
selections.reason: Gabrielle Johnston riding, Jane Clement trained. Decent benchmark form.

danger_horse.name: Krystina Kerima
danger_horse.reason: Last-start winner who is in great form.

selections.name: City Gold Speed
selections.reason: Aaron Bullock riding, Jeremy Gask trained. Excellent 2nd last start at Taree, drawn barrier 2 which is ideal for Gunnedah.

selections.name: Zousanity
selections.reason: Mikayla Weir riding, Wayne Wilkes trained. Last start winner at Tamworth.

selections.name: Ephemeral
selections.reason: Donovan Dillon riding, Lou Mary trained. Last start winner at Tamworth.

selections.name: Miss Karis
selections.reason: Madeline Owen riding, Brett Robb trained. Consistent placings.

danger_horse.name: Zousanity
danger_horse.reason: Tamworth winner who is a strong threat.
